context: Tests whether the agent creates a CONSTITUTION.md that strictly follows IIKit governance rules: spec-agnostic (no technology choices), at least 3 principles, correct semver versioning, and TDD determination stored in .specify/context.json via jq merge.

checklist.name: No technology stack in constitution
checklist.description: CONSTITUTION.md does NOT contain specific technology choices such as database names (PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, MySQL), frameworks (FastAPI, Django, React), languages (Python, Node.js), or library/tool versions

checklist.name: No implementation details
checklist.description: CONSTITUTION.md does NOT contain implementation specifics like file structures, API schemas, data models, architecture diagrams, or service configurations

checklist.name: At least 3 principles
checklist.description: CONSTITUTION.md contains at least 3 distinct named principles (sections or subsections identifying governance rules)

checklist.name: Governance content present
checklist.description: CONSTITUTION.md contains governance content: non-negotiable development rules, quality standards, compliance expectations, and/or amendment procedures

checklist.name: Semver version present
checklist.description: CONSTITUTION.md includes a version number in semver format (e.g., 1.0.0, 0.1.0) with a CONSTITUTION_VERSION or equivalent field

checklist.name: Dates in ISO format
checklist.description: Any dates in CONSTITUTION.md are in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

checklist.name: .specify/context.json created
checklist.description: A .specify/context.json file exists containing a tdd_determination field

checklist.name: TDD determination value valid
checklist.description: The tdd_determination value in .specify/context.json is one of: 'mandatory', 'optional', or 'forbidden'

checklist.name: Principles are declarative
checklist.description: Constitution principles use declarative language (MUST, SHALL, REQUIRED, PROHIBITED) rather than vague aspirational language

checklist.name: Amendment procedure present
checklist.description: CONSTITUTION.md includes a section or description of how the constitution can be amended (versioning, ratification, or change process)
